---
title: "Probability Theory"
description: "Quick summary of the underlying probability theory needed to understand statistical modelling.  This includes random variables, probability distributions and conditional expectation."
author: "John Robin Inston"
date: "2026-05-14"
date-modified: "2026-05-14"
toc: true
title-block-banner: false
sidebar: pstat100-notes
page-navigation: true
execute:
    echo: true
---
